selftext: Lately I have been suffering with a pretty serious episode of anxiety/depression. But what I really need to vent about right now is my level of confidence and self esteem. It’s in the absolute trash and I know that a large reason for this is the fact that my boyfriend and I have practically no sex life. He has his own anxiety issues and he says that coupled with previous medications and such is the reason why he’s just not interested in sex. And logically that makes sense. Rationally I can understand it. But MY anxiety tells me it’s because he’s not attracted to me and is interested in other women. I’m not a babe. I’ve struggled with my weight my whole life. Too big, then I was “too skinny” and now I’ve gained weight and he makes comments about me going to the gym so I don’t “hate myself” this summer and so I can look amazing for him too. It seems like he couldn’t care less if I’m naked in front of him. I’ve tried sending sexy pictures and he doesn’t really care about that either so I just stopped trying. I’ve stopped trying. It’s not his fault for not caring about sex but I guess can’t get my brain on board to accept that reasoning. I feel so undesirable and physically unwanted and it’s sending me into a pit of despair. It’s making me suspicious and untrusting no matter how hard I try to fight it. And I just feel like a freaking unattractive blob of a human.

i need help! i have diagnosed adhd, depression, and anxiety. i’m not sure if this is executive dysfunction (it probably is) or laziness or lack of self discipline. about a month ago i spontaneously quit my job as a nanny because i just could not do it anymore. i feel like a failure/looser. i’m still having a hard time finding a job. i spend every day in bed and my room is disgusting and the dishes have been piling up. when my long distance SO came to visit it was so much easier to do things. (probably the body doubling aspect of adhd). i really want to be able to function independently but i literally cannot. i am glued to this bed. I have nothing to do and nobody to go see. I also have been picking at my toenails almost every day for years and i just want to stop. i’m embarassed of myself and i haven’t showered in 4 days. Does anyone have any tips or tricks just to get themselves out of bed?

I am from Europe, originally from Eastern Europe, now residing in Northern Europe. I already had some anxiety since I had a lot on my plate, because I have a thesis to finish as soon as possible, because I plan to start a new job earlier then my degree finishes. The job would move me to central Europe. For the past 3 days I couldn't stop reading about Ukraine-Russian crisis. Now Russian is threatening Sweden and Finland if they join NATO, where my family lives and I currently reside. I know it isn't bad as in some other place and I should be grateful that I am not as close to tension, but it has impact that affects my productivity. Not sure how to deal with this.

I overheard my mom talking to my grandmother few minutes ago. She was on speakerphone, not realising I was out of the shower. My grandfather has bipolar disorder, and grandma was complaining how living with him was tormenting her. She said people with mental illness are better off dead than sticking around to be a burden to the family. And my mom wholeheartedly agreed. She knows I have depression and anxiety, knows about my self-harm and suicidal urges. She say she needs me by her side. But clearly, she doesn’t mean it. Btw I was raised by my grandparents when I was young. They’re like a second parents to me. No one wants me to stay.

I'm an actor. I do voice over and sometimes stage acting as well. Whenever there is any sort of death scene I just keep repeating those scenes in my mind wishing that were me, or that I was being saved somehow. I didn't used to do this. I've had previous attempts but I went to a mental hospital and it traumatized me because of how they treated me. I don't want to go back there. I feel like I'm getting nowhere. My mom constantly screams at me, I try being friends with people and most of the time it doesn't work out, I do my best at work but my family calls me useless and ridiculous sometimes there when I say that I can't hear properly to take over-the-phone orders because I can't hear very well, and I just tried to talk to the person I'm dating about an issue and they got extremely pissed with me. The only time I feel at peace is when I imagine myself as the character that's dying or is close to dying but being saved. I'm scared and I don't know what to do. It's been getting worse

selftext: i just have no interest in anything. i desperately scroll through netflix for something to watch, i'm on social media until there's nothing to see, and i feel very alone. i'm not doing anything with my life and i also can't seem to be bringing myself to do anything at all. i have seen a therapist before which she thinks i have depression but i just don't think that's exactly true. i've also stopped therapy because i don't feel like it helps. it's not too bad you know. i mean i just hate myself and hate how i'm living but it's not like i can't go on day to day.. although meaningless. nothing can fill the void in my heart and i just don't know what to do anymore. not interested in picking up hobbies. just living my life day to day. is this really depression or am i just a chronic procrastinator + laziness?

everyday is the exact same. i have no goals or aspirations, i try to think hard about what i’d enjoy but it all feels so claustrophobic and pointless. partying is the only thing that makes me feel anymore, but i lost all my friends and have none left to go to - and they’re always over anyway. there’s nothing to do in this world, everything’s so expensive and meaningless. it’s hard to meet decent people. once you do something you’ve been wanting to do it’s all over and you’re left empty again waiting to fill up the emptiness with something again and trying to distract yourself, but the distractions rarely come. it’s just so incredibly average being alive - and that’s when it’s at its best. what’s the point in staying?

I know this sounds stupid but i'm so used to spending 95% of my time completely alone that i genuinely can't even imagine spending time with a person i'm interested in or going on a date. The idea of it seems so unfathomable to me that it makes me not even want to try to meet someone because i'm convinced that i'm gonna screw it up or that its going to be awful. Does anyone else feel like this? I feel like i'm struggling with something extremely basic and that makes me think that i'm just not going to be able to ever have a relationship

This has been happening to me since i can't remember but never as bad as today. It takes a huge amount of effort for me to even get out of the house. And I have to go to my uni clasess every day. Not going to a single one means losing track which means failing the entire semester which means paying a ton more money and wasting another year. I don't have friends there and recently I lost my two best friends which has destroyed me. Today I felt like I was going to die and I started to breathe a lot and to think that I have nothing to live for so I should kill myself which made me even more anxious and stressed. It's only the first day of class and I dont think Im gonna make it if I dont do something My therapist tries to help me but there's only so much she can do What can I do? What are my options?

Im not sure why i feel miserable. I finally got the internship/employment. Im doing okay in school ( well probably not brian fog despite studying hours) . I have friends and litreally everything i wanted a few years ago But i cant shake this feeling of hurting myself again (ive been clean of selfharm for 4 months and pretty clean for a year) but my god it just doesnt stop. I just want one day where i dont constantly feel sadness or anxiety. I just want to be normal. I dont want this anymore Maybe i should go on meds but, ive heard those things can fuck you up Note:im not actively suicidal but i wouldn't mind dying soon tho

selftext: I'm a 33 year old female and I can't help but feel like I'm going to be alone forever. I recently got out of a 7 year old toxic relationship and after that, a very toxic "friendship". I've been betrayed by both of them and I know I deserve better. However, sometimes I want to just go back to them. A big part of me wants someone I can vent to at night, someone that can comfort me, someone that's there for me. I'm always the person that people vent to but nobody ever comforts me. I'm stuck in this loop and I'm so tired of it. I never had emotional support from parents growing up and I was always taught to never show any weakness. But I can't stand it. I'm crying most nights and I'm so exhausted. I have little appetite and I can't enjoy anything. I don't know what to do.

How do I create healthy boundaries? I apologize to much for things that aren’t my fault. I’m a pushover and I’m usually walked all over. I want to change this narrative. I’m not entirely sure how to create healthy boundaries. I’ve started not responding to texts if I’m busy with something with in reason. Before I would answer right away. I stood up for myself a couple weeks ago (on the phone) when I didn’t deserve being yelled at. If I wasn’t able to hang out with friends or to events I put those boundaries in place. These are the only examples I can think of so far. If anyone has any suggestions please comment if you can.

I feel so empty most of the time and people used to make fun of me because of my race. The people who make fun of me but now I’m friends with them but I put a fake face. I’m scared to show anyone about my feelings. Others have told me you can talk to me but I don’t want to bother them since they have a great future. Every time I try think about my future I just see nothing. I want to end it all I have no one and parent just think it is a phase. I just want to end it and I keep thinking about to do it. I’d not know what to do anymore.

I was already very lazy in many aspects of Life but it was something i could live with, but the addition of depression makes it hard to do even the most simple of acts, like i was at one point so unable to move that i skipped diner because i didn't want to make it. It's actually dangerous just how hard even the tiniest acts can be, hell even brushing my teeth is incredibly difficult. I'm Lucky to be smart enough to where i don't need to study for school because i didn't even spend a second learning or even thinking about school at Home. How can i function like this? I have a desire to sleep for 3 months straight because of the overwhelming exhaustion I'm feeling

For the past two months i have been working 10-12 hours a day, working on a construction site and are way behind schedule, the pay is decent but I am mentally struggling. I barely have anytime for myself and my hobbies and spending time with my friends. I feel like my life is weathering away I am not doing anything with it. I tried saying no telling I can't find anytime for myself but everyone there basically told me "oh your just complaining, look at me I get back home at 10 and go sleep at 2 and wake up at 6 like nothing, I am perfect working machine and you should be more like me" everyone was making me feel bad and guilty about it like taking breaks makes me somehow a lesser person. I hate this.
